summary.key_theme: Micron 憑藉強勁的 AI 記憶體需求與亮眼財報實現上半年股價飆漲，但面臨潛在競爭對手上市壓力、價格操縱訴訟及獲利了結賣壓的挑戰。

bullish.title: Micron Technology (MU) Gets Major Price Target Raise as Strategic Contracts Strengthen Outlook
bullish.reason: 華爾街分析師因戰略合約與 AI 需求上調目標價，顯示市場對其長期獲利能力信心增強。

bullish.title: Surging Earnings Estimates Signal Upside for Micron (MU) Stock
bullish.reason: 財報預估持續上修，反映 AI 記憶體需求強勁，為股價提供基本面支撐。

bullish.title: MU Stock Caps Best First Half Ever With 4x Surge, Cracks S&P 500’s Top 10: Retail Bulls Want More
bullish.reason: 上半年股價成長 4 倍並進入 S&P 500 前十大權重股，顯示強大的市場動能與投資人熱度。

bullish.title: 3 AI Infrastructure Stocks Up 500%+ With More Upside in 2H 2026
bullish.reason: 被列為 AI 基礎設施領頭羊，預期下半年仍有成長空間。

bearish.title: Micron Stock Price Prediction: After a 4x First Half, the Forecast Flashes Sell
bearish.reason: 上半年漲幅過大，技術面與估值面出現獲利了結的賣出訊號。

bearish.title: Dear Micron Stock Fans, Mark Your Calendars for July 10 — SK Hynix’s U.S. market debut on July 10 could test Micron’s AI memory dominance
bearish.reason: SK Hynix 即將在美上市，可能分食 Micron 在 AI 記憶體市場的市佔率與投資人關注度。

bearish.title: Micron and Other Memory Makers Are Being Sued Over Price Fixing Claims
bearish.reason: 面臨 DRAM 價格操縱集體訴訟，雖目前視為頭條風險，但法律不確定性可能影響股價。

bearish.title: Could SanDisk Be The Biggest AI Memory Winner? Bernstein Points To Hidden Advantage Over Micron
bearish.reason: 分析師指出 SanDisk 在合約保護上優於 Micron，可能導致部分資金轉移。

neutral.title: Micron Technology Announces $250M Investment Through Trump Accounts
neutral.reason: 宣布 2.5 億美元投資計畫，屬於常規財務配置，對股價影響有限。

neutral.title: Micron (MU) Stock Looks Below Fair Value But Broader Checks Stay Mixed
neutral.reason: 估值雖低於公允價值，但市場調查結果多空分歧，方向不明。
